CodeExamples.title: Installation / Get Started
CodeExamples.desc: Install via NPM or use the CDN. || SunEditor integrates seamlessly with your favorite framework.

Hero.title: A lightweight and powerful WYSIWYG editor in vanilla JavaScript.

FeatureGrid.title: Everything you need, and more.
FeatureGrid.desc: SunEditor is designed for flexibility and power, right out of the box.

Architecture.title: Plugin-Based, Multi-Instance Architecture
Architecture.desc: Each editor instance runs independently with its own plugin configuration.

Table.title: Advanced Table Editing
Table.desc: Insert, merge, split, and style tables with granular control over rows and cells.

DocumentLayout.title: Document Layout System
DocumentLayout.desc: Supports A4 page breaks, headers, footers, and print-friendly formatting.

PDF.title: PDF-Ready HTML Output
PDF.desc: Generates structured HTML output suitable for server-side PDF rendering.

RTL.title: Right-to-Left (RTL) Support
RTL.desc: Full RTL layout including toolbar alignment, indentation, and text flow.

Math.title: Math Formula Rendering
Math.desc: Supports LaTeX expressions via KaTeX or MathJax for academic content.

FinalCTA.title: Try it now
FinalCTA.desc: Free and open source. Explore the docs or contribute on GitHub.

GettingStarted.title: Getting Started
GettingStarted.desc: Install, create the editor, and display saved content.

step2.title: Content Rendering
step2.desc: When displaying HTML generated by the editor, CSS and class names are required.

step3.title: $ Kernel API
step3.desc: All editor internals are accessible through the $ dependency bag — a single object shared across the entire system.
step3.deepDiveLink: Learn more in the Architecture Deep Dive

cta.title: Try it live
cta.desc: Real npm imports, full bundler — edit code and see the result instantly.

Playground.title: SunEditor Playground
Playground.desc: Configure options, test the editor, and share your setup via URL.

filtering.textStyleTagFilter: Filters text style tags (b, i, u, span, etc.)

Playground.formatExtDesc: Adds additional format tags beyond the built-in defaults. Delimiter: |. Supports regex (e.g. H[1-6]).

PluginGuide.title: SunEditor Plugins
PluginGuide.subtitle1: SunEditor ships with 24 built-in plugins covering media, formatting, and advanced features.
PluginGuide.subtitle2: Each plugin belongs to a display type that determines how it appears in the toolbar.
PluginGuide.builtInDesc: The display property defines how the plugin interacts with the user.

displayTypes.modalDesc: Opens a dialog window for complex input like file upload, link editing, or embedding.
displayTypes.dropdownDesc: Shows a dropdown panel below the toolbar button with selectable options.
displayTypes.commandDesc: Executes an action immediately on click without opening any UI.
displayTypes.inputDesc: Renders an inline input control directly in the toolbar.
displayTypes.fieldDesc: Shows an autocomplete overlay triggered by typing a special character.

plugins.table: Table creation grid and editing tools
plugins.fontSize: Font size numeric input with controls

PluginGuide.tryOptionsDesc: Plugins marked <badge>configurable</badge> have options you can tweak in the Playground.
PluginGuide.playgroundSidebarDesc: Adjust image upload limits, font size units, table scroll types, mention triggers, and more. Changes apply instantly to a live editor.

custom.title: Create Your Own Plugin
custom.desc: Technical reference for building custom plugins — from simple command buttons to full dialog-based features.
custom.classRefsDesc: Register plugin classes in options.plugins. The kernel instantiates them.
custom.depInjectionDesc: All editor services are accessed via this.$ — never import core modules directly.
custom.contractsDesc: Implement multiple contracts (ModuleModal, EditorComponent) to hook into lifecycles.
custom.typesDesc: Choose a base class based on how your plugin interacts with the user.
custom.depsBagDesc: All plugins access editor services through this.$. Built once by CoreKernel and shared.
custom.jsdocPatternsDesc: Three annotation patterns for type-safe hooks in JavaScript. All hooks should use @hook, @override, or @imple with @type.
custom.commonHooksDesc: Can be implemented by any plugin type.
custom.eventHooksDesc: Return false to stop remaining plugins and prevent default behavior. Return true to stop plugins but allow default.
custom.moduleHooksDesc: When a plugin uses a module, it implements the corresponding contract interface.
custom.componentHooksDesc: For plugins that create static components in the editor (images, videos, tables).
custom.extendsVsImplementsDesc: A plugin uses extends for its base type and implements for composing additional capabilities.
custom.extendsExplain: Inherit from exactly one plugin base class. This determines the plugin's type and core behavior (command, modal, dropdown, etc.).
custom.implementsExplain: Compose module contracts (ModuleModal, EditorComponent) or other plugin interfaces (fontSize, anchor) to add capabilities.
custom.modulesRefDesc: Modules are UI components that plugins instantiate manually in their constructor.
custom.multiInterfaceDesc: A single plugin can combine a base type with multiple contract interfaces.
custom.crossPluginDesc: A plugin can also implements other plugin type interfaces to provide multiple interaction modes.
custom.crossPluginNote: Use cross-plugin implements when a single plugin provides multiple interaction modes (e.g., input + dropdown + command all controlling the same feature).
custom.examplesDesc: Complete, copy-ready examples from simple to complex.
custom.example1Desc: A command plugin that shows the current word count.
custom.example2Desc: A dropdown plugin that applies predefined block styles.
custom.example3Desc: A modal plugin with controller and component lifecycle for embedded iframes.
custom.registrationDesc: Plugins are registered as class references in options.plugins.
custom.pluginOptionsDesc: Pass plugin-specific options via options[pluginKey]. Received as the second constructor argument.
custom.rule1: Always pass class references — the kernel manages instantiation and lifecycle.
custom.rule2: static key must match the name used in buttonList.
custom.rule3: PluginField plugins don't need buttonList — they respond to editor events automatically.
custom.builtInRefDesc: Study these built-in plugins for real-world implementation patterns.

FeatureDemo.title: Feature Catalog
FeatureDemo.subtitle: Explore every capability SunEditor v3 offers — from basic text formatting to advanced document layouts.

categories.textFormattingDesc: Rich text styling, fonts, colors, alignment, and paragraph formatting.
categories.mediaDesc: Images, video, audio, embedded content, drawing canvas, and file uploads.
categories.tableStructureDesc: Full table editing, lists, blockquotes, horizontal rules, and page breaks.
categories.advancedDesc: Math equations, mentions, links, code view, character counting, and history.
categories.modesLayoutDesc: Four toolbar modes, document layout with A4 pages, multi-root editing, and full-screen.
categories.platformDesc: Zero dependencies, TypeScript, i18n, security filtering, plugin API, and export.

features.boldItalicDesc: Core inline formatting with subscript and superscript support.
features.fontFamilyDesc: Select from multiple font families via dropdown.
features.fontSizeDesc: Numeric input with configurable units (px, pt, em, rem, %).
features.fontColorDesc: Color picker with palette and hex input for text color.
features.bgColorDesc: Highlight text with background color picker.
features.alignmentDesc: Left, center, right, and justify alignment options.
features.blockStylesDesc: Paragraph, heading levels, pre, and div block formatting.
features.lineHeightDesc: Adjustable line spacing for better readability.
features.copyFormatDesc: Copy formatting from one selection and apply to another.
features.imageUploadDesc: Upload via drag & drop, paste, or file browser with gallery view.
features.imageResizeDesc: Drag handles to resize, set exact dimensions, and choose alignment.
features.videoDesc: Insert video from URL or upload with aspect ratio control.
features.audioDesc: Embed audio files with built-in player controls.
features.embedDesc: Embed external content like YouTube or custom iframes with resize.
features.drawingDesc: Canvas-based drawing that outputs as data URL or SVG.
features.fileUploadDesc: Upload and attach files with configurable size limits and formats.
features.tableInsertDesc: Create tables with a visual grid selector.
features.cellMergeDesc: Merge multiple cells or split merged cells back.
features.rowColOpsDesc: Insert, delete, and resize rows and columns.
features.listsDesc: Bulleted and numbered lists with nesting support.
features.blockquoteDesc: Quote formatting toggle for cited content.
features.hrDesc: Six built-in horizontal rule styles as section dividers.
features.pageBreakDesc: Insert page breaks for print-ready documents.
features.mathDesc: LaTeX formula rendering via KaTeX or MathJax.
features.mentionDesc: Autocomplete user tagging triggered by @ with API integration.
features.linksDesc: Create hyperlinks with target options and in-page anchors.
features.codeViewDesc: Switch to raw HTML editing with syntax awareness.
features.charCounterDesc: Count by character, byte, or byte-html with max limit.
features.undoRedoDesc: Full history stack with configurable delay.
features.classicModeDesc: Traditional fixed toolbar at the top of the editor.
features.inlineModeDesc: Toolbar appears inline within the content area.
features.balloonModeDesc: Floating toolbar appears on text selection.
features.balloonAlwaysDesc: Floating toolbar is always visible near the cursor.
features.documentLayoutDesc: A4 page breaks, headers, footers for print-friendly formatting.
features.multiRootDesc: Multiple independent editable regions in a single instance.
features.fullScreenDesc: Expand the editor to full viewport with offset support.
features.zeroDepsDesc: Pure vanilla JavaScript — no external runtime dependencies.
features.tsSupportDesc: Full type definitions with JSDoc annotations for IDE support.
features.i18nRtlDesc: Multi-language UI with full right-to-left layout support.
features.strictModeDesc: Strict mode with tag, attribute, class, and style filtering.
features.pluginAPIDesc: Build custom plugins with DI pattern and lifecycle hooks.
features.exportPdfDesc: Export to PDF, print with custom templates, and preview mode.
features.keyboardDesc: Full keyboard navigation and customizable shortcut bindings.

FeatureDemo.pluginGuideDesc: Explore 24+ built-in plugins and create your own

DeepDive.title: SunEditor Architecture
DeepDive.subtitle: Explore the internal architecture, design patterns, and technical implementation of SunEditor v3.
DeepDive.pluginGuideDesc: Explore 24+ built-in plugins and build your own

DocsApi.title: API Reference
DocsApi.editorInstanceDesc: The editor instance contains the Kernel ($), the internal engine that powers all subsystems. Access it via editor.$ — e.g. editor.$.store, editor.$.selection, editor.$.format, etc.
DocsApi.kernelInfoDesc: The Kernel ($) is the internal engine of SunEditor. It is structured in layers: L2 Config providers initialize first, then L3 Logic subsystems are constructed with those providers injected. All subsystems are accessible via editor.$ (e.g. editor.$.selection, editor.$.format).
DocsApi.layerL2Desc: Configuration providers initialized in Phase 1. contextProvider and optionProvider manage global/frame contexts and options, instanceCheck enables iframe-safe type checks, and eventManager provides the public event API.
DocsApi.layerL2AccDesc: Convenience getter properties on $ that provide direct access to frequently-used configuration data from contextProvider and optionProvider — such as DOM references (context, frameContext), editor settings (options, frameOptions), and UI resources (icons, lang).
DocsApi.layerL3DomDesc: DOM manipulation and content analysis subsystems. Provides a unified abstraction over contentEditable: offset calculates positions, selection manages ranges, format handles block-level structure, inline applies character-level styling, html sanitizes content, and char enforces character limits.
DocsApi.layerL3ShellDesc: Editor operation and interaction orchestration. component manages rich media lifecycles, pluginManager handles plugin registration, commandDispatcher routes button clicks to plugins, history manages undo/redo, and shortcuts maps keyboard commands.
DocsApi.layerL3PanelDesc: UI presentation layer. toolbar renders the main toolbar, subToolbar is an optional second toolbar instance, menu handles dropdowns and selection effects, and viewer controls view modes (code view, fullscreen, preview).
